sectionDescription: Designed to serve all stakeholders in Qatar's charitable ecosystem with transparency and efficiency

cards.title: Donors
cards.description: Individuals and corporates united to make a difference.
features: Give with confidence through transparent tracking
Flexible payment options: bank transfer, QR code
Receive instant confirmations and real-time impact updates
Choose from health, education, relief campaigns

cards.title: Charities
features: Create and manage donation campaigns efficiently
Upload legal documents and licenses for verification
Track donations and distribution to beneficiaries
Generate automated reports for RACA compliance

cards.title: Authority (RACA)
cards.description: Regulatory body with oversight and compliance tools.
features: View all donations and campaigns in real-time
Receive automated compliance and financial reports

bannerDescription: Our platform integrates directly with Qatar's national Sandi platform to ensure coordinated aid distribution and prevent duplication of assistance.
bannerFeatures: Sync beneficiary data to prevent duplicate assistance
Unified database combining Sandi and our platform
Full visibility of all aid distribution in Qatar
